description: A trader wants to analyze the value of Congestion Revenue Rights (CRRs), also known as FTRs, to see if they are a profitable investment.

nodes.task_description: Identify the top 10 most historically congested transmission paths in the market.

expected_outcome.value: Agent produces a ranked list of congested paths.

nodes.task_description: For each path, compare the historical auction price of the CRR to its actual payout (the congestion rent).

expected_outcome.value: Agent calculates the historical profitability of holding CRRs on each path.

nodes.task_description: Recommend the most historically profitable CRRs to bid on in the next auction.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides a list of the top 3 CRRs to target.
